evidence: Platform official FIFA roster row has position GK.
Selected Reep candidate is the only goalkeeper among same-name candidates and is a modern active player born 2002-03-07.
Other candidates are defender/forward/unknown or implausible for the current goalkeeper slot.
Platform official FIFA roster row has Haiti forward context.
Selected Reep candidate is Louicius Don Deedson, a Haiti forward born 2001-02-11 with broad modern provider coverage.
The unmatched platform name is a shortened form that drops the middle name Don.
Platform official FIFA roster row has Haiti midfielder context.
Public provider profiles identify Woodensky Pierre as a Haiti footballer with Transfermarkt player ID 1017735 and National Football Teams player ID 104090.
Reep 2026.17 people.csv and names.csv contain no matching row or alias for Woodensky Pierre, so the Reep mapping remains missing.
